raw_consumer_statement: XXXX, I ordered a XXXX XXXX. My cc was charged the day I ordered it. After many emails from the company, XXXX, apologizing for the shipping delay, it was supposedly shipped on XX/XX/XXXX. I received it XX/XX/XXXX. After using the product ( XXXX XXXX ) i realized it hurt my neck and sent 2 emails to the company, last one was XX/XX/XXXX, asking to return it since their return window was 90 days. No response. I contacted my credit card company and wanted to dispute the XXXX charge. That was XX/XX/XXXX. Citi bank contacted them on XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX didnt respond until XX/XX/XXXX. They stated I didnt follow the instructions to return. Dispute was denied. Now the 90 day window has passed no fault of mine. I sent citi bank the info they requested and they still denied the dispute. I think Citibank had their mind made up because the paperwork they requested from me had to be received by them by XX/XX/XXXX. They sent me an email on XX/XX/XXXX stating I never complied and they again refused to do anything. Then I called credit card company again and they told me I had to call this company. I told them I tried and the number and no live voice, no option to leave a message. Citi started the dispute again but as of today, they said too much time has passed and they couldnt do anything about it.
